products_covered: applications that reference this Privacy Notice (together "Amazon Services")

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy does not mention health data at all, so it cannot be evaluated for data minimization principles specific to health data.
The policy does not mention physiological data, so no assessment of minimization practices for this specific category can be made from the provided text.

collected.policy_snippet: Our physical stores may use cameras, computer vision, sensors, and other technology to gather information about your activity in the store, such as the products and services you interact with.
collected.purpose: To gather information about customer activity in physical stores.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'We collect your personal information in order to provide and continually improve our products and services' and provides broad examples, but does not describe concrete and meaningful limits on what physical data is collected or provide clear justification for why each type is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services...
stored.purpose: To retain information about customer use of services for ongoing operations and improvement.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: You can choose to automatically delete your voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests to Alexa after a specified period of time (3 or 18 months), or you can choose to not save any voice recordings.
retention_policy.policy_snippet_inactivity: If you choose automatic deletion after 3 or 18 months, we will delete the voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests associated with a chat once the specified period of time has passed since your last request to Alexa within that chat.

shared.policy_snippet: We share customers' personal information only as described below... Third-Party Service Providers: We employ other companies and individuals to perform functions on our behalf.
shared.purpose: To enable third-party service providers to perform functions on Amazon's behalf.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data collection in stores via cameras and sensors creates surveillance risks. Data is stored and shared with third-party service providers, including international transfers. While deletion options exist for voice data, the policy lacks specific retention limits for other physical data like store footage.

collected.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
collected.purpose: To provide, troubleshoot, and improve Amazon Services; to recommend features, products, and services; to personalize the user experience; and to display interest-based ads.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'We collect your personal information in order to provide and continually improve our products and services' and provides broad examples of collection, but does not describe concrete, meaningful limits on what behavioral data is collected or provide a clear justification for why each type is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services
stored.purpose: To operate, provide, develop, and improve products and services, including personalization and recommendations.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: You can choose to automatically delete your voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests to Alexa after a specified period of time (3 or 18 months), or you can choose to not save any voice recordings.

shared.policy_snippet: We provide ad companies with information that allows them to serve you with more useful and relevant Amazon ads and to measure their effectiveness.
shared.purpose: To serve users with more useful and relevant Amazon ads and to measure their effectiveness.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Behavioral data is collected broadly for personalization and advertising, stored, and shared with third-party advertisers. While some deletion options exist for Alexa interactions, the policy lacks clear, general retention limits for other behavioral data.
